ddls:
CREATE TABLE "watersheds" (
  "watershed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watershed */,
  "watershed_name" TEXT /* Name of the watershed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the watershed (e.g., Athens, GA, USA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watershed */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the watershed */,
  "sub_watersheds" TEXT /* JSON array of sub-watersheds within the watershed */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the watershed in square meters */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the watershed record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the watershed record was last updated */,
  "gis_data" TEXT /* Reference to the GIS data for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watershed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the land use category (e.g., Tree Canopy, Water) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the land use category was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the land use category was last updated */,
  "gis_data" TEXT /* Reference to the GIS data for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land use category */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the land use type (e.g., Coniferous, Deciduous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the land use type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the land use type was last updated */,
  "gis_data" TEXT /* Reference to the GIS data for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impervious_surface_types" (
  "impervious_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impervious surface type */,
  "impervious_name" TEXT /* Name of the impervious surface type (e.g., Bare Soil, Buildings) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impervious surface type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the impervious surface type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the impervious surface type was last updated */,
  "gis_data" TEXT /* Reference to the GIS data for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impervious_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shrub_types" (
  "shrub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shrub type */,
  "shrub_name" TEXT /* Name of the shrub type (e.g., Shrubs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shrub type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the shrub type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the shrub type was last updated */,
  "gis_data" TEXT /* Reference to the GIS data for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shrub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wetland_types" (
  "wetland_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wetland type */,
  "wetland_name" TEXT /* Name of the wetland type (e.g., Emergent, Forested) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wetland type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the wetland type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the wetland type was last updated */,
  "gis_data" TEXT /* Reference to the GIS data for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wetland_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, environmental scientist, policymaker) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land use record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land use record being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
